data.content: Shipment review approved. Verified: (1) commits f634b31074d9 and 90762f445417 are on main; earlier commits 72bc39925e0a and 7672184b9e16 are on feature branches only (consistent with regression/retake). (2) All 4 CI workflows green on main (CI 23290961410, Repo Hygiene 23290961468, Release 23290961407, Changesets 23290961423). (3) No invariants defined. (4) Code review confirms: exactly 2 managed skills (knots, knots-e2e), proper eligibility logic, exact path output (not counts), comprehensive tests (17 unit + 5 integration), doctor integration with fix support. (5) Workspace clean, no regressions detected.
